subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! I address thee with the tongue of my spirit and the utterance of my heart, and say unto thee: Rejoice in the grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها المنجذبه بنفحات الله انی اخاطبک بلسان روحی و بیان قلبی و اقول لک ابشری بفضل
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
